name: BAR-H

meta.data_required: one categorical dimension + one non-negative measure

see_instead.when: the data is a time series

use_when: ranking categories by a single measure
category names too long for vertical bars
not_when: magnitude in natural category order (use CH-MAG-01 COLUMN)
more than 12 categories (aggregate the tail into Other)

data_shape.title: string, action title stating the finding with a number
data_shape.eyebrow: string caps, rendered only when the DL chrome asks for it
data_shape.unit: string, appears once, on the first value label
data_shape.categories: array of {label: string, value: number >= 0, highlight?: bool}, at most one highlight

scale.note: bars scale to the max value; no axis, no ticks, direct labels carry the numbers

rules: rows sorted descending by value; the renderer enforces this
direct value labels; no value axis, no gridlines
at most one highlighted bar (role primary); all others role muted
unit appears once, on the first value label only
anti_patterns: value axis plus direct labels (pick direct labels)
alphabetical sorting when the message is rank
qa: title states a finding with a number
